# helixon-mcp

> General-purpose MCP (Model Context Protocol) server in Go that bridges
> Helixon — an open-source autonomous AI assistant runtime — with any
> MCP-compatible client (Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, Continue, Zed).

## Overview

- Name: helixon-mcp
- Purpose: MCP server bridging Helixon autonomous AI runtime to MCP clients; provides 13 default tools (health, chat, jobs, memory search, routines, agent spawn, metrics) via the documented Helixon HTTP gateway API.
- Language(s): Go
- License: MIT
- Authoritative README: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/ironclaw-mcp#readme>
- Source of truth branch: `main`

## Quick Start

- Install:
  ```
  go install github.com/nfsarch33/ironclaw-mcp/cmd/helixon-mcp@latest
  export HELIXON_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000
  helixon-mcp --version
  ```
- Build from source:
  ```
  git clone https://github.com/nfsarch33/ironclaw-mcp.git
  cd helixon-mcp
  make build
  ./bin/helixon-mcp --version
  ```
- MCP client config (Cursor / Claude Code / VS Code Copilot):
  ```json
  {
    "mcpServers": {
      "helixon": {
        "command": "helixon-mcp",
        "env": {
          "HELIXON_BASE_URL": "http://localhost:3000",
          "HELIXON_API_KEY": "<api-key>"
        }
      }
    }
  }
  ```
- Smoke test: `make smoke`
- Minimum runtime prerequisites: Go 1.24+, running Helixon instance

## Key Concepts

- Architecture: `docs/architecture.md` — Cursor/Claude → stdio → helixon-mcp → HTTP/REST → Helixon gateway
- Configuration: `docs/configuration.md` — all via environment variables (`HELIXON_BASE_URL`, `HELIXON_API_KEY`, `MCP_TRANSPORT`, etc.)
- Default tool surface: 13 tools (health, chat, jobs, memory search, routines, agent spawn, metrics)
- Changelog: `CHANGELOG.md`
- Testing: `make check` (tidy + fmt + vet + lint + test); coverage gate 70%, current ~84%

## Runnable Examples

- Smoke test all tools: `make smoke SMOKE_ARGS="--all"`
- JSON report for CI: `./scripts/smoke-test.sh --all --report | jq '.summary'`
- Docker: `make docker-build && make docker-run`

## Related Repos

- [Helixon](https://github.com/nearai/helixon) — the autonomous AI runtime this server bridges

## Operational Notes

- Issue tracker: <https://github.com/nfsarch33/ironclaw-mcp/issues>
- Security policy: `SECURITY.md`
- How to contribute: `CONTRIBUTING.md`
